titles.title: A bill to repeal the 90/10 rule as it pertains to proprietary schools under title IV of the Higher Education Act of 1965.
A bill to repeal the 90/10 rule as it pertains to proprietary schools under title IV of the Higher Education Act of 1965.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.

committee.name: Senate Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions
